title: Update company credentials and remove featured projects section

requirements.summary: Update the About section credentials to display '5+ Years' of experience instead of '10+ Years'
acceptanceCriteria: The About section displays '5+ Years' in the experience credential card
The change is visible on the live website

file_operations.description: Update the years of experience credential from '10+ Years' to '5+ Years' in the credentials grid display

requirements.summary: Update the About section credentials to display '10+ Projects' completed instead of '150+ Projects'
acceptanceCriteria: The About section displays '10+ Projects' in the completed projects credential card
The description text is updated accordingly

file_operations.description: Update the completed projects credential from '150+ Projects' to '10+ Projects' and adjust the description text to reflect the updated count

requirements.summary: Update the About section credentials to display '20+ Team' size instead of '75+ Team'
acceptanceCriteria: The About section displays '20+ Team' in the team size credential card
The team description reflects the updated size

file_operations.description: Update the team size credential from '75+ Team' to '20+ Team' and adjust the team description to reflect the updated size

requirements.summary: Remove the entire Projects Portfolio section from the website
acceptanceCriteria: The Projects component is no longer rendered in App.tsx
The Projects section is not visible anywhere on the website
Navigation flows smoothly from Services to Government sections without the Projects section

file_operations.description: Remove the Projects component import and remove the Projects section from the component render tree so that the page flows from Services directly to Government section
